title: URGENT CARE - 211info
text: ADVENTIST HEALTH PRIMARY CARE VERNONIA URGENT CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides walk-in treatment services for people who have minor illnesses or injuries. Urgent care centers serve as an alternative to hospital emergency departments. 1005 Cougar Street Vernonia, OR 97064 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 815-2292 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 815-2292 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment or walk in for urgent care FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurances DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Columbia County Services: Urgent Care Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - PRIMARY CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
